attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE)

 minus
 select MESSAGE_3B2_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNHEADER_I
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.MESSAGE_3B2_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNHDR_IB_IF.MESSAGE_3B2_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNHDR_IB_IF.REFRESH_DATETIME
